code:
import string
import list

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errors: List<String> = []
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errors = list.push(errors, "empty-name")
  end
  if age < 0
    errors = list.push(errors, "negative-age")
  end
  if age > 150
    errors = list.push(errors, "too-old")
  end
  errors
end

fn join_errors(_ errors: List<String>) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < errors.len()
    let item = match errors.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ""
    end
    if i == 0
      result = item
    else
      result = "#{result},#{item}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn print_result(_ errors: List<String>) -> Unit
  if errors.len() == 0
    print("ok")
  else
    print("errors=#{join_errors(errors)}")
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  print_result(validate("", -5))
  print_result(validate("Alice", 30))
  print_result(validate("Bob", 200))
end
